title: Compute and persist generalization-gap and stability metrics
description:
## Summary
Compute comparison metrics that quantify whether a score is generalizing beyond curated cases.

## Deliverables
- Compute the benchmark-versus-random generalization gap.
- Compute stability/variance signals across random runs.
- Define how these signals are stored and surfaced in workflow results.

## Notes
These metrics should be interpretable by operators, not just raw math outputs.
